title: States, actions, goals and costs deterministic AI draft bank

publication.changeSummary: Misconception MCQ, evidence-boundary fill-gap for States, actions, goals and costs; all items remain blocked from formal exams pending independent human review.

items.title: States, actions, goals and costs: reject the overclaim
items.prompt: Which statement is source-bounded and corrects this AI misconception? A search state only needs the agent's current position; history, resources, or permissions never affect future legal actions.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted unreviewed draft; independent human technical, source, pedagogy, safety, accessibility, and answer-oracle review is required before formal-exam eligibility.

hints: Choose the statement that names mechanism, evidence conditions, and the boundary of the claim rather than a fluent or benchmark-based overgeneralization.

feedback.correct: Correct. Encode every fact needed to determine successors, goal status, and future cost while merging histories only when they are behaviorally equivalent.
feedback.incorrect: That option preserves the overclaim. Encode every fact needed to determine successors, goal status, and future cost while merging histories only when they are behaviorally equivalent.

criteria.description: Selects the source-bounded correction and rejects the documented AI overclaim.

privateAuthorNotes: Human reviewer must verify the correction against cited sources and ensure the distractor does not normalize unsafe or overstated claims.

options.text: Encode every fact needed to determine successors, goal status, and future cost while merging histories only when they are behaviorally equivalent.
A search state only needs the agent's current position; history, resources, or permissions never affect future legal actions.

answer.explanation: Encode every fact needed to determine successors, goal status, and future cost while merging histories only when they are behaviorally equivalent.

items.title: States, actions, goals and costs: canonical evidence boundary
items.prompt: Complete the exact source-bounded correction phrase; the complete sentence must remain an honest beginner-to-intermediate claim.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted unreviewed draft; independent human technical, source, pedagogy, safety, accessibility, and answer-oracle review is required before formal-exam eligibility.

hints: Retrieve the short checkpoint from the correction and ensure it narrows rather than expands the evidence claim.

feedback.correct: Correct. The checkpoint is 'behaviorally equivalent'. Encode every fact needed to determine successors, goal status, and future cost while merging histories only when they are behaviorally equivalent.
feedback.incorrect: The phrase must preserve the technical and responsible-AI boundary. Encode every fact needed to determine successors, goal status, and future cost while merging histories only when they are behaviorally equivalent.

criteria.description: Supplies the exact canonical phrase that completes the bounded source-aligned correction.

privateAuthorNotes: Human reviewer must verify the accepted phrase and technically equivalent variants before learner use.
items.template: Encode every fact needed to determine successors, goal status, and future cost while merging histories only when they are [[checkpoint]].

answer.explanation: Encode every fact needed to determine successors, goal status, and future cost while merging histories only when they are behaviorally equivalent.
